originalTitle: Live RL Research on PufferLib w/ Joseph Suarez
title: Debugging Mingru Recurrent Architecture and Fixing Paddle Bug in Breakout
summary: Worked on integrating Mingru as a parallel RNN replacement for LSTM, running experiments on Breakout and 2048 to assess performance. Identified that RMS norm and deeper layers are needed to match LSTM performance. Fixed a missing paddle initialization bug in the C++ Breakout environment that prevented gameplay. Also reviewed a community PR for an Artillery environment with reward shaping.
